title: Chapter 116
content:

However, before I could say anything to him, Zara was the one who spoke and said, “Th-these are not filthy… This is the proof of something… superior.”

[You have ejaculated inside Zara Hector]

Woah! What the…

By a whole hundred. That’s like a lot of level-ups. Not to mention, it would cover one of Zara’s most crucial weaknesses. Her physical strength.

Even Cassandra, who received a skill heal skill despite being a knight, was something special.

I didn’t ponder on it much then because I was too surprised due to the sudden pregnancy scare, but I now I have to wonder if these effects would take place every time.

What if Zara’s strength could be increased by so much?

But I knew that question was useless. My lives that I had lived so far have taught me one lesson. Balance is the key to the entire universe.

If one gains something, one loses something as well. The same goes for vice versa.

In this case, even if Zara didn’t lose something, she wouldn’t always gain overpowered abilities overnight. I was willing to bet my left arm that either this was a one-time occurrence, or even if it did repeat, it wouldn’t be the same effect.

Or it could just be possible that it was performed in stages, like my awakening and all.

I couldn’t tell for sure, but further testing was required because I didn’t see the same messages when I screwed Cassandra a second time with Sandra.

I did fuck her enough throughout the night that her stat gain was massive, but she didn’t receive a skill, and I didn’t see any notification about the blessings as well.

“Haa…”

Why can’t everything just be explained in a manual? Others get it, so why not me?

“Haa…”

I sighed once again, longer this time, as I entered the house I was staying at with my family, which I presumed was sleeping, but I was dead wrong.

“Why are you sighing so much? What’s troubling you?” I saw Lucas as soon as I entered the living room area connected to the kitchen and the hallway that led to the rooms on the ground floor.

He was sitting there with Cassandra, and both of them seemed to be engaged in a conversation.

“Nothing. I just had a lot of work today.” I replied and looked at Cassandra. She nodded at me in greeting, but there was nothing much from her.

“Young lady.” I greeted her back and made my way behind them on the crude sofa of this era and went straight for her nipples, which made her shudder.

I nodded to myself, proud that she was still as submissive as before.

I let go of her soft tit and asked, “I was surprised to find you here this late, young lady.”

“I asked mother if I could sleep here tonight, and while my brothers were reluctant, she didn’t deny.” Cassandra simply replied.

Oho. So it was the girlfriend boyfriend sleepover. I wonder what they intended to do the entire night, but I knew what they wouldn’t be doing for sure.

It was strange for Zara to let her stay out the night, given that this timeline was very strict about reputation and stuff. If she let her out regardless, it meant she was serious about having my brother as her son-in-law.

I would have liked to claim that it was to create a deeper bond with me. That would also explain half of the reason why her son, the same one I just nutted on tonight, wanted to marry Sandra. The other half was Sandra’s beauty, of course.

I won’t admit that was also the reason I chose him instead of Zara’s other son tonight.

Anyway, “Then I will stop being a thorn in your plans. May you enjoy your night here, young lady.”

I slapped her tit gently as I said so, watching it jiggle, while my brother harrumphed as if I finally said something that made sense.

“Alright.” Cassandra simply replied, considering the situation was normal and all.

As I walked away, I heard Lucas saying, “I don’t know what his obsession with touching women comes from.”

“I think there’s nothing wrong with it.” Cassandra replied, to which Lucas could only reply, “Yes, yes. Nothing wrong with it.”

Haha. He was whipped.
